# personalName

**Type Property**

A tag indicating that the token is a personal name.

## Declaration

```swift
static let personalName: NLTag
```

## Name types

- **organizationName**: A tag indicating that the token is an organization name.
- **placeName**: A tag indicating that the token is a place name.

items.description: A tag indicating that the token is an organization name.
items.name: organizationName

items.description: A tag indicating that the token is a place name.
items.name: placeName
